content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>gc过程的markl跟sweep是什么阶段做的操作,具体操作干了啥,目的是啥</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-14</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING START
=======================

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>WebFetch</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-14T08:17:36.690Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"url\":\"https://android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/concurrent_copying.cc\",\"prompt\":\"列出 ConcurrentCopying::RunPhases() 的阶段调用(InitializePhase / FlipThreadRoots / MarkingPhase / CopyingPhase / ReclaimPhase / FinishPhase),以及 CC GC 中有没有传统意义的 sweep ? 关键代码注释。\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"bytes\":1506629,\"code\":200,\"codeText\":\"OK\",\"result\":\"## RunPhases() 阶段调用顺序\\n\\n```cpp\\nvoid ConcurrentCopying::RunPhases() {\\n  InitializePhase();\\n  if (use_generational_cc_ && !young_gen_ && !force_evacuate_all_) {\\n    MarkingPhase();\\n  }\\n  ActivateReadBarrierEntrypoints();\\n  GrayAllDirtyImmuneObjects();\\n  FlipThreadRoots();\\n  CopyingPhase();\\n  VerifyNoFromSpaceReferences();  // 可选\\n  ReclaimPhase();\\n  FinishPhase();\\n}\\n```\\n\\n各阶段职责：\\n- **InitializePhase**：绑定 bitmap、清空状态、根据 `force_evacuate_all_` 决定是否全量疏散。\\n- **MarkingPhase**：仅在 generational + full GC 时执行；扫描免疫空间、并发根、线程根；用 `ComputeLiveBytesAndMarkRefFieldsVisitor` 计算存活字节。\\n- **FlipThreadRoots**：通过 `FlipCallback::SetFromSpace` 把 region 切换为 from-space，并 `SwapStacks()`。\\n- **CopyingPhase**：扫描 dirty card 上的脏对象，调用 `Scan()` 完成对象拷贝/修复引用。\\n- **ReclaimPhase**：回收 from-space 区域。\\n- **FinishPhase**：收尾、清理。\\n\\n## CC GC 没有传统意义的 sweep\\n\\nCC 是 **copying collector**，淘汰发生时机：\\n\\n```cpp\\n// FlipCallback 中调用\\ncc->region_space_->SetFromSpace(cc->rb_table_, evac_mode, /*clear_live_bytes=*/ ...);\\n```\\n\\n`from-space` 通过 `evac_mode` 选定（`kEvacModeNewlyAllocated` / `kEvacModeLivePercentNewlyAllocated` / `kEvacModeForceAll`），存活对象在 `CopyingPhase` 中被 `Scan()` 拷到 to-space，from-space 区域随后在 `ReclaimPhase` 整体回收——这是\\\"隐式 sweep\\\"，无需遍历整个堆标记 dead object。\",\"durationMs\":16749,\"url\":\"https://android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/concurrent_copying.cc\"}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

If a <parameters> or <outcome> block above contains an "<elided chars=... />" marker, that field was truncated to fit the observer's context window. Describe only what you can see in the kept portion and do not infer details about the elided range.

Return either one or more <observation>...</observation> blocks, or an empty response if this tool use should be skipped.
Concrete debugging findings from logs, queue state, database rows, session routing, or code-path inspection count as durable discoveries and should be recorded.
Never reply with prose such as "Skipping", "No substantive tool executions", or any explanation outside XML. Non-XML text is discarded.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content:
--- MODE SWITCH: PROGRESS SUMMARY --- ⚠️ CRITICAL TAG REQUIREMENT — READ CAREFULLY: • You MUST wrap your ENTIRE response in ... tags. • Do NOT use tags. output will be DISCARDED and cause a system error. • The ONLY accepted root tag is . Any other root tag is a protocol violation. PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT =========================== Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request. Claude's Full Response to User: # Android ART GC: Mark 与 Sweep 阶段详解 [知识来源: Web 搜索 - 4 引擎并行] - Serper Google: `Android ART GC mark sweep phase implementation MarkSweep concurrent` - DuckDuckGo: `ART runtime garbage collector mark phase sweep phase root scan card table` - Tavily (advanced): `Android ART concurrent mark sweep GC algorithm phases mark stack sweep dead objects` - MiniMax 中文: `Android ART GC mark sweep 阶段 标记 清理 三色标记 root 扫描 卡表` [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/mark_sweep.cc] [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/mark_sweep.h] [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/concurrent_copying.cc] [置信度: 高] --- ## 0. 先把"GC 类型"和"Mark/Sweep 阶段"分清楚 ART 上的 GC 大类有三种,只有 **CMS** 才严格意义上有"Mark + Sweep"两阶段: | 类型 | 全称 | 你看的 SDK 36 中的角色 | 有没有传统 Sweep | |---|---|---|---| | CMS | Concurrent Mark Sweep (`mark_sweep.cc`) | fallback / 部分 zygote | ✅ 有 | | CC | Concurrent Copying (`concurrent_copying.cc`) | Android 8 ~ 13 默认 | ❌ 没有,from-space 整体丢弃就是"隐式 sweep" | | CMC | Concurrent Mark Compact (`mark_compact.cc`) | Android 14+ 默认 | ❌ 没有,改为 mark + compact | 下面以 **CMS (MarkSweep)** 为主轴讲透"什么阶段做了什么、目的是啥",最后再说明 CC/CMC 的差异。 --- ## 1. 主流程: `MarkSweep::RunPhases()` 三大阶段 CMS 是一个典型的 **追踪式可达性 GC**,把一次回收切成 **三大阶段** + 一个 finish: ``` RunPhases() ├── MarkingPhase ← 并发,持 mutator 共享锁 ├── PausePhase ← STW (Stop-The-World),持 mutator 排他锁 ├── ReclaimPhase ← 并发(包含 Sweep) └── FinishPhase ← 统计、清空 mark stack、ClearMarkedObjects ``` 为什么这么切?核心是 **"想标得准 又不想让 app 停顿太久"**,所以把大部分标记工作放进并发阶段,只把"补漏"放进 STW pause 里。 --- ## 2. Mark 阶段 (做"找出谁还活着") Mark 实际上分散在 **MarkingPhase (并发) + PausePhase (STW 补漏)** 两个阶段里,这是 CMS 区别于"原地踏步式标记清除"的关键。 ### 2.1 MarkingPhase —— 并发阶段,app 还在跑 代码顺序(摘自 `mark_sweep.cc`): ```cpp void MarkSweep::MarkingPhase() { BindBitmaps(); // 1. 锁定 immune space FindDefaultSpaceBitmap(); // 2. 拿到主 alloc space 的 mark bitmap heap_->ProcessCards(...); // 3. 处理脏卡 / 老化 MarkRoots(self); // 4. 标记根 MarkReachableObjects(); // 5. 从根递归追踪 PreCleanCards(); // 6. 预清理脏卡 (减少 STW) } ``` 逐项的"干了啥 / 为啥": #### ① `BindBitmaps()` — 圈出"永不回收"的空间 - 把 `kGcRetentionPolicyNeverCollect` 的 space (例如 boot image、zygote space) 标为 **immune** - 做法: 让它们的 mark bitmap 直接复用 live bitmap - **目的**: 这些空间里的对象已经认定为"全部活",mark 阶段不用真的去走它们的字段,只在做 mod-union 时处理跨空间引用 #### ② `FindDefaultSpaceBitmap()` — 锁定主 alloc bitmap - 优先选非 non-moving 的连续 space,把它的 mark bitmap 设到 `current_space_bitmap_` - **目的**: 标记位图操作热路径不用每次查 space → bitmap 的映射 #### ③ `heap_->ProcessCards()` — 处理 card table - card table = 一个 1 字节/512 字节堆的辅助结构,write barrier 命中时把对应 byte 置 `kCardDirty` - 这一步把脏卡老化(`kCardDirty` → `kCardAged`)或清掉,送给 mod-union table - **目的**: 知道"自上次 GC 以来哪些 region 被改过",并发追踪时只需重扫这些 card #### ④ `MarkRoots(self)` — 标根 内部三步: - `MarkRootsCheckpoint`: 用 checkpoint 机制,让每个 mutator 线程在自己的 safepoint 把 **栈上的 oop / JNI local refs / handle scope** 报上来 (不全局 STW,只让每个线程经过自己的 safepoint) - `MarkNonThreadRoots`: 全局 monitor、boot class loader、intern strings 等非线程根 - `MarkConcurrentRoots`: JNI global、JNI weak global、类加载器、AOT method roots 等 把这些"根"对象在 mark bitmap 中置位,并压入 mark stack。 - **目的**: 找出 GC 的起点。可达性的定义是"从根出发能走到的对象" #### ⑤ `MarkReachableObjects()` → `RecursiveMark()` / `ProcessMarkStack()` — 从根递归追踪 注释原文: `"Builds a mark stack and recursively mark until it empties."` 工作模型 = 三色标记的工程实现: - **白**: live bitmap 中存在但 mark bitmap 里没置位的对象 (候选 garbage) - **灰**: 已置位,但还在 mark stack 里待扫描 - **黑**: 已置位,且其引用的子对象也已入栈/被标记 `ScanObject(obj)` 注释: `"Blackens an object."` — 遍历 obj 的所有引用字段,每个引用对象如未标记则置位 mark bitmap + 推入 mark stack。 并行优化: 单线程走 prefetch ringbuffer (`BoundedFifoPowerOfTwo`),多线程走 `ProcessMarkStackParallel` 按 `kMinimumParallelMarkStackSize=128` 分块派到 ThreadPool。 - **目的**: 把可达性图遍历完。这是 mark 阶段的核心。 #### ⑥ `PreCleanCards()` — 预清理 - 在 STW pause 之前再处理一遍并发期间新脏的 card - **目的**: 把 STW 的 ReMark 工作量提前消化到并发阶段,**让 pause 尽可能短** ### 2.2 PausePhase —— STW 补漏 代码注释: `"Handle the dirty objects if we are a concurrent GC."` ```cpp ReMarkRoots(); // 重新扫一遍根 (新增的 root) RecursiveMarkDirtyObjects(true, ...) // = ScanGrayObjects + ProcessMarkStack SwapStacks(); // 交换 alloc / live stack DisallowNewSystemWeaks(); ReferenceProcessor::EnableSlowPath(); ``` 为什么必须 STW: > 并发标记期间,mutator 可能改写引用 — 比如 **黑色对象 A 新引用了一个之前未被任何灰对象引用的白色对象 B**,如果不补漏 B 就会被错杀。 补漏的两个手段: - **Write Barrier + Card Table**: app 写引用时,把目标地址所在 card 置脏。STW 时只重扫脏 card 上的灰对象 (`RecursiveMarkDirtyObjects`),不用重扫整堆 - **ReMarkRoots**: 处理那些在并发期间新增的根 (例如新建的 JNI global) `SwapStacks` 注释: `"Need to revoke all the thread local allocation stacks since we just swapped the allocation stacks"` — 把 GC 期间新分配的对象切到 live stack 里,准备 sweep 时统一处理。 --- ## 3. Sweep 阶段 (做"把死对象的内存还回去") Sweep 在 `ReclaimPhase` 里,**并发执行**(没错,即使叫 "concurrent mark **sweep**",sweep 自己也是并发的): 代码注释原文: `"Sweeping always done concurrently, even for non concurrent mark sweep."` ```cpp void MarkSweep::ReclaimPhase() { ProcessReferences(...) // 1. 处理软/弱/虚/finalizer 引用 SweepSystemWeaks(self); // 2. 清理 system weaks CleanupClassLoaders(); // 3. 卸载已死的 ClassLoader Sweep(false); // 4. 主 sweep SweepLargeObjects(false); // 5. 大对象 sweep SwapBitmaps(); // 6. 交换 live/mark bitmap UnBindBitmaps(); // 7. 解绑 immune 空间的位图 } ``` 逐项展开: #### ① `ProcessReferences()` - 委托 `ReferenceProcessor::ProcessReferences` 处理软引用 (Soft)、弱引用 (Weak)、虚引用 (Phantom)、Finalizer - 顺序: Soft (够内存就保留) → Weak → Finalizer (放入 finalizer queue,推迟一轮 GC 才真死) → Phantom - **目的**: Java 引用语义的实现。`Reference.get()` 的返回值在这里被决定 (清零或保留) #### ② `SweepSystemWeaks()` - 扫 intern string table、ClassLinker 持有的字典、JIT inline cache、JNI weak global ref 等 - 对每个 weak,若引用的对象未在 mark bitmap 中,就清掉这个 weak 条目 - **目的**: 这些表是"弱持有",不能阻止 GC,但 GC 后必须把指向死对象的条目擦掉 #### ③ `CleanupClassLoaders()` - 注释: `"Clean up class loaders after system weaks are swept since that is how we know if class unloading occurred."` - **目的**: ART 支持类卸载,当一个 ClassLoader 自己变成不可达,它加载的所有 Class、Method、Field、DexCache 都得卸载 #### ④ `Sweep(false)` — 真正的 sweep 主体 - 先 `MarkAllocStackAsLive`: 注释 `"Mark everything allocated since the last GC as live so that we can sweep concurrently"` — 把 GC 开始后新分配的对象一律当 live - 然后遍历每个 `ContinuousMemMapAllocSpace`,对每个 space: - 拿到 live bitmap 和 mark bitmap - 计算差集 = "live 上有,mark 上没" = 死对象 - 把这些对象的内存还给 space 的 freelist (RosAlloc / DlMalloc) - **目的**: 这就是"清理"。死对象不需要逐个析构 —— Java 没 destructor,finalize 已在 ① 处理过,所以纯粹是把字节还给分配器 #### ⑤ `SweepLargeObjects(false)` - 对 `LargeObjectMapSpace` / `LargeObjectSpace` 做同样的事 - 大对象 (≥ 12KB 阈值,版本相关) 单独 mmap,sweep 时直接 `munmap` 整块 - **目的**: 大对象数量少、单个大,不走 freelist 比走 freelist 划算 #### ⑥ `SwapBitmaps()` - 注释原文: `"Swap the live and mark bitmaps for each space ... This is an optimization that enables us to not clear live bits inside of the sweep."` - 含义: 不用专门去 `memset(live_bitmap, 0)`,而是把 mark bitmap 直接当下一轮的 live bitmap,把原 live bitmap 当下一轮的 mark bitmap (它已经过期,反正下次 mark 前会被复用) - **目的**: 把"清零 bitmap"的成本省掉,只一次指针交换 #### ⑦ `UnBindBitmaps()` - 解除 `BindBitmaps()` 时绑定的 immune 空间映射,恢复独立的 live / mark bitmap - **目的**: 让下一轮 GC 重新决定 immune 范围 --- ## 4. Mark + Sweep 协作总图 ```mermaid flowchart TD A[GC trigger] --> B[MarkingPhase
并发] B --> B1[BindBitmaps
圈定 immune] B1 --> B2[ProcessCards
消化 write barrier 脏卡] B2 --> B3[MarkRoots
线程/JNI/常量 根] B3 --> B4[RecursiveMark
三色追踪/ScanObject blacken] B4 --> B5[PreCleanCards
预清并发期间新脏卡] B5 --> C[PausePhase
STW] C --> C1[ReMarkRoots
补新增根] C1 --> C2[RecursiveMarkDirtyObjects
扫脏卡上的灰对象] C2 --> C3[SwapStacks
alloc 切 live] C3 --> D[ReclaimPhase
并发 Sweep] D --> D1[ProcessReferences
Soft/Weak/Phantom/Finalizer] D1 --> D2[SweepSystemWeaks
intern/JNI weak/JIT cache] D2 --> D3[CleanupClassLoaders
类卸载] D3 --> D4[Sweep
live - mark = 死对象 → freelist] D4 --> D5[SweepLargeObjects
munmap] D5 --> D6[SwapBitmaps
免去清零 live] D6 --> E[FinishPhase
清 mark stack/ClearMarkedObjects] ``` --- ## 5. CC (Concurrent Copying) 与 CMC 的差别 你当前的 coredump 是 SDK 36,理论上是 CC (生成式) 或 CMC。它们的"Mark"还在,但"Sweep"消失了: **CC** (`concurrent_copying.cc::RunPhases()`): ```cpp InitializePhase(); if (use_generational_cc_ && !young_gen_ && !force_evacuate_all_) MarkingPhase(); // 仅 generational full GC 用,统计存活字节 ActivateReadBarrierEntrypoints(); GrayAllDirtyImmuneObjects(); FlipThreadRoots(); // STW: SetFromSpace + SwapStacks CopyingPhase(); // Scan() 把活对象拷到 to-space ReclaimPhase(); // 直接释放 from-space 整片 region FinishPhase(); ``` - **没有传统 sweep**: from-space 的 region 被 `RegionSpace::ClearFromSpace` 一次性回收,死对象的内存无需逐个还给 freelist - **Read Barrier** 替代 write barrier 解决并发拷贝时引用的"forwarding pointer"问题 **CMC** (Mark Compact, Android 14+): - Mark 阶段保留 (类似 CMS) - Sweep 被 **Compact** 取代:整理活对象到一端,空闲就在另一端,顺带消灭碎片 --- ## 6. 关键结论(直接回答你的问题) | 问题 | 回答 | |---|---| | **Mark 在哪个阶段?** | `MarkingPhase` (并发) + `PausePhase` (STW 补漏)。CMS 三阶段中前两个都属于 mark 范畴 | | **Mark 干了啥?** | 标根 → 三色追踪 → 在 mark bitmap 中置位所有"从根可达"的对象。借助 card table + write barrier 处理并发期间的引用变更 | | **Mark 目的?** | 确定"谁还活着"。只标活的,不标的就是 candidate garbage | | **Sweep 在哪个阶段?** | `ReclaimPhase` (并发,即使名字叫 concurrent mark sweep,sweep 也是并发的) | | **Sweep 干了啥?** | 先处理 Reference / system weaks / class unloading,再遍历 live bitmap 与 mark bitmap 的差集,把死对象内存还给 freelist 或 munmap;最后 swap bitmap 省去清零开销 | | **Sweep 目的?** | 把可达性分析判定为死的对象的内存释放回分配器,供后续 alloc 复用 | --- ## 知识来源(本轮实际调用) - 4 引擎并行 Web 搜索: - Serper Google: `Android ART GC mark sweep phase implementation MarkSweep concurrent` - DuckDuckGo: `ART runtime garbage collector mark phase sweep phase root scan card table` - Tavily (advanced): `Android ART concurrent mark sweep GC algorithm phases mark stack sweep dead objects` - MiniMax: `Android ART GC mark sweep 阶段 标记 清理 三色标记 root 扫描 卡表` - AOSP master 源码交叉验证: - `art/runtime/gc/collector/mark_sweep.cc` (RunPhases / MarkingPhase / PausePhase / ReclaimPhase 全流程) - `art/runtime/gc/collector/mark_sweep.h` (方法签名 + 嵌入注释) - `art/runtime/gc/collector/concurrent_copying.cc` (CC 没有传统 sweep 的依据) 被推翻的训练数据假设: 无 — 关键阶段名 (MarkingPhase / PausePhase / ReclaimPhase) 与方法名 (BindBitmaps / RecursiveMark / SweepSystemWeaks / SwapBitmaps) 与 AOSP master 一致。 --- > 💡 是否需要把这块内容沉淀到 `docs/exploration/` (例如 `11-art-gc-mark-sweep.md`) 作为项目知识库的一部分?(你的 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 里已经有 ART GC space 相关的解析能力,这块知识跟 `cmd_class` / `is_valid_object` 的可达性判断是直接关联的。) Respond in this XML format: [Short title capturing the user's request AND the substance of what was discussed/done] [What has been explored so far? What was examined?] [What have you learned about how things work?] [What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?] [What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?] [Additional insights or observations about the current progress] REMINDER: Your response MUST use as the root tag, NOT . IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one. Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content. Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

--- MODE SWITCH: PROGRESS SUMMARY --- ⚠️ CRITICAL TAG REQUIREMENT — READ CAREFULLY: • You MUST wrap your ENTIRE response in ... tags. • Do NOT use tags. output will be DISCARDED and cause a system error. • The ONLY accepted root tag is . Any other root tag is a protocol violation. PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT =========================== Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request. Claude's Full Response to User: # Android ART GC: Mark 与 Sweep 阶段详解 [知识来源: Web 搜索 - 4 引擎并行] - Serper Google: `Android ART GC mark sweep phase implementation MarkSweep concurrent` - DuckDuckGo: `ART runtime garbage collector mark phase sweep phase root scan card table` - Tavily (advanced): `Android ART concurrent mark sweep GC algorithm phases mark stack sweep dead objects` - MiniMax 中文: `Android ART GC mark sweep 阶段 标记 清理 三色标记 root 扫描 卡表` [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/mark_sweep.cc] [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/mark_sweep.h] [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/concurrent_copying.cc] [置信度: 高] --- ## 0. 先把"GC 类型"和"Mark/Sweep 阶段"分清楚 ART 上的 GC 大类有三种,只有 **CMS** 才严格意义上有"Mark + Sweep"两阶段: | 类型 | 全称 | 你看的 SDK 36 中的角色 | 有没有传统 Sweep | |---|---|---|---| | CMS | Concurrent Mark Sweep (`mark_sweep.cc`) | fallback / 部分 zygote | ✅ 有 | | CC | Concurrent Copying (`concurrent_copying.cc`) | Android 8 ~ 13 默认 | ❌ 没有,from-space 整体丢弃就是"隐式 sweep" | | CMC | Concurrent Mark Compact (`mark_compact.cc`) | Android 14+ 默认 | ❌ 没有,改为 mark + compact | 下面以 **CMS (MarkSweep)** 为主轴讲透"什么阶段做了什么、目的是啥",最后再说明 CC/CMC 的差异。 --- ## 1. 主流程: `MarkSweep::RunPhases()` 三大阶段 CMS 是一个典型的 **追踪式可达性 GC**,把一次回收切成 **三大阶段** + 一个 finish: ``` RunPhases() ├── MarkingPhase ← 并发,持 mutator 共享锁 ├── PausePhase ← STW (Stop-The-World),持 mutator 排他锁 ├── ReclaimPhase ← 并发(包含 Sweep) └── FinishPhase ← 统计、清空 mark stack、ClearMarkedObjects ``` 为什么这么切?核心是 **"想标得准 又不想让 app 停顿太久"**,所以把大部分标记工作放进并发阶段,只把"补漏"放进 STW pause 里。 --- ## 2. Mark 阶段 (做"找出谁还活着") Mark 实际上分散在 **MarkingPhase (并发) + PausePhase (STW 补漏)** 两个阶段里,这是 CMS 区别于"原地踏步式标记清除"的关键。 ### 2.1 MarkingPhase —— 并发阶段,app 还在跑 代码顺序(摘自 `mark_sweep.cc`): ```cpp void MarkSweep::MarkingPhase() { BindBitmaps(); // 1. 锁定 immune space FindDefaultSpaceBitmap(); // 2. 拿到主 alloc space 的 mark bitmap heap_->ProcessCards(...); // 3. 处理脏卡 / 老化 MarkRoots(self); // 4. 标记根 MarkReachableObjects(); // 5. 从根递归追踪 PreCleanCards(); // 6. 预清理脏卡 (减少 STW) } ``` 逐项的"干了啥 / 为啥": #### ① `BindBitmaps()` — 圈出"永不回收"的空间 - 把 `kGcRetentionPolicyNeverCollect` 的 space (例如 boot image、zygote space) 标为 **immune** - 做法: 让它们的 mark bitmap 直接复用 live bitmap - **目的**: 这些空间里的对象已经认定为"全部活",mark 阶段不用真的去走它们的字段,只在做 mod-union 时处理跨空间引用 #### ② `FindDefaultSpaceBitmap()` — 锁定主 alloc bitmap - 优先选非 non-moving 的连续 space,把它的 mark bitmap 设到 `current_space_bitmap_` - **目的**: 标记位图操作热路径不用每次查 space → bitmap 的映射 #### ③ `heap_->ProcessCards()` — 处理 card table - card table = 一个 1 字节/512 字节堆的辅助结构,write barrier 命中时把对应 byte 置 `kCardDirty` - 这一步把脏卡老化(`kCardDirty` → `kCardAged`)或清掉,送给 mod-union table - **目的**: 知道"自上次 GC 以来哪些 region 被改过",并发追踪时只需重扫这些 card #### ④ `MarkRoots(self)` — 标根 内部三步: - `MarkRootsCheckpoint`: 用 checkpoint 机制,让每个 mutator 线程在自己的 safepoint 把 **栈上的 oop / JNI local refs / handle scope** 报上来 (不全局 STW,只让每个线程经过自己的 safepoint) - `MarkNonThreadRoots`: 全局 monitor、boot class loader、intern strings 等非线程根 - `MarkConcurrentRoots`: JNI global、JNI weak global、类加载器、AOT method roots 等 把这些"根"对象在 mark bitmap 中置位,并压入 mark stack。 - **目的**: 找出 GC 的起点。可达性的定义是"从根出发能走到的对象" #### ⑤ `MarkReachableObjects()` → `RecursiveMark()` / `ProcessMarkStack()` — 从根递归追踪 注释原文: `"Builds a mark stack and recursively mark until it empties."` 工作模型 = 三色标记的工程实现: - **白**: live bitmap 中存在但 mark bitmap 里没置位的对象 (候选 garbage) - **灰**: 已置位,但还在 mark stack 里待扫描 - **黑**: 已置位,且其引用的子对象也已入栈/被标记 `ScanObject(obj)` 注释: `"Blackens an object."` — 遍历 obj 的所有引用字段,每个引用对象如未标记则置位 mark bitmap + 推入 mark stack。 并行优化: 单线程走 prefetch ringbuffer (`BoundedFifoPowerOfTwo`),多线程走 `ProcessMarkStackParallel` 按 `kMinimumParallelMarkStackSize=128` 分块派到 ThreadPool。 - **目的**: 把可达性图遍历完。这是 mark 阶段的核心。 #### ⑥ `PreCleanCards()` — 预清理 - 在 STW pause 之前再处理一遍并发期间新脏的 card - **目的**: 把 STW 的 ReMark 工作量提前消化到并发阶段,**让 pause 尽可能短** ### 2.2 PausePhase —— STW 补漏 代码注释: `"Handle the dirty objects if we are a concurrent GC."` ```cpp ReMarkRoots(); // 重新扫一遍根 (新增的 root) RecursiveMarkDirtyObjects(true, ...) // = ScanGrayObjects + ProcessMarkStack SwapStacks(); // 交换 alloc / live stack DisallowNewSystemWeaks(); ReferenceProcessor::EnableSlowPath(); ``` 为什么必须 STW: > 并发标记期间,mutator 可能改写引用 — 比如 **黑色对象 A 新引用了一个之前未被任何灰对象引用的白色对象 B**,如果不补漏 B 就会被错杀。 补漏的两个手段: - **Write Barrier + Card Table**: app 写引用时,把目标地址所在 card 置脏。STW 时只重扫脏 card 上的灰对象 (`RecursiveMarkDirtyObjects`),不用重扫整堆 - **ReMarkRoots**: 处理那些在并发期间新增的根 (例如新建的 JNI global) `SwapStacks` 注释: `"Need to revoke all the thread local allocation stacks since we just swapped the allocation stacks"` — 把 GC 期间新分配的对象切到 live stack 里,准备 sweep 时统一处理。 --- ## 3. Sweep 阶段 (做"把死对象的内存还回去") Sweep 在 `ReclaimPhase` 里,**并发执行**(没错,即使叫 "concurrent mark **sweep**",sweep 自己也是并发的): 代码注释原文: `"Sweeping always done concurrently, even for non concurrent mark sweep."` ```cpp void MarkSweep::ReclaimPhase() { ProcessReferences(...) // 1. 处理软/弱/虚/finalizer 引用 SweepSystemWeaks(self); // 2. 清理 system weaks CleanupClassLoaders(); // 3. 卸载已死的 ClassLoader Sweep(false); // 4. 主 sweep SweepLargeObjects(false); // 5. 大对象 sweep SwapBitmaps(); // 6. 交换 live/mark bitmap UnBindBitmaps(); // 7. 解绑 immune 空间的位图 } ``` 逐项展开: #### ① `ProcessReferences()` - 委托 `ReferenceProcessor::ProcessReferences` 处理软引用 (Soft)、弱引用 (Weak)、虚引用 (Phantom)、Finalizer - 顺序: Soft (够内存就保留) → Weak → Finalizer (放入 finalizer queue,推迟一轮 GC 才真死) → Phantom - **目的**: Java 引用语义的实现。`Reference.get()` 的返回值在这里被决定 (清零或保留) #### ② `SweepSystemWeaks()` - 扫 intern string table、ClassLinker 持有的字典、JIT inline cache、JNI weak global ref 等 - 对每个 weak,若引用的对象未在 mark bitmap 中,就清掉这个 weak 条目 - **目的**: 这些表是"弱持有",不能阻止 GC,但 GC 后必须把指向死对象的条目擦掉 #### ③ `CleanupClassLoaders()` - 注释: `"Clean up class loaders after system weaks are swept since that is how we know if class unloading occurred."` - **目的**: ART 支持类卸载,当一个 ClassLoader 自己变成不可达,它加载的所有 Class、Method、Field、DexCache 都得卸载 #### ④ `Sweep(false)` — 真正的 sweep 主体 - 先 `MarkAllocStackAsLive`: 注释 `"Mark everything allocated since the last GC as live so that we can sweep concurrently"` — 把 GC 开始后新分配的对象一律当 live - 然后遍历每个 `ContinuousMemMapAllocSpace`,对每个 space: - 拿到 live bitmap 和 mark bitmap - 计算差集 = "live 上有,mark 上没" = 死对象 - 把这些对象的内存还给 space 的 freelist (RosAlloc / DlMalloc) - **目的**: 这就是"清理"。死对象不需要逐个析构 —— Java 没 destructor,finalize 已在 ① 处理过,所以纯粹是把字节还给分配器 #### ⑤ `SweepLargeObjects(false)` - 对 `LargeObjectMapSpace` / `LargeObjectSpace` 做同样的事 - 大对象 (≥ 12KB 阈值,版本相关) 单独 mmap,sweep 时直接 `munmap` 整块 - **目的**: 大对象数量少、单个大,不走 freelist 比走 freelist 划算 #### ⑥ `SwapBitmaps()` - 注释原文: `"Swap the live and mark bitmaps for each space ... This is an optimization that enables us to not clear live bits inside of the sweep."` - 含义: 不用专门去 `memset(live_bitmap, 0)`,而是把 mark bitmap 直接当下一轮的 live bitmap,把原 live bitmap 当下一轮的 mark bitmap (它已经过期,反正下次 mark 前会被复用) - **目的**: 把"清零 bitmap"的成本省掉,只一次指针交换 #### ⑦ `UnBindBitmaps()` - 解除 `BindBitmaps()` 时绑定的 immune 空间映射,恢复独立的 live / mark bitmap - **目的**: 让下一轮 GC 重新决定 immune 范围 --- ## 4. Mark + Sweep 协作总图 ```mermaid flowchart TD A[GC trigger] --> B[MarkingPhase
并发] B --> B1[BindBitmaps
圈定 immune] B1 --> B2[ProcessCards
消化 write barrier 脏卡] B2 --> B3[MarkRoots
线程/JNI/常量 根] B3 --> B4[RecursiveMark
三色追踪/ScanObject blacken] B4 --> B5[PreCleanCards
预清并发期间新脏卡] B5 --> C[PausePhase
STW] C --> C1[ReMarkRoots
补新增根] C1 --> C2[RecursiveMarkDirtyObjects
扫脏卡上的灰对象] C2 --> C3[SwapStacks
alloc 切 live] C3 --> D[ReclaimPhase
并发 Sweep] D --> D1[ProcessReferences
Soft/Weak/Phantom/Finalizer] D1 --> D2[SweepSystemWeaks
intern/JNI weak/JIT cache] D2 --> D3[CleanupClassLoaders
类卸载] D3 --> D4[Sweep
live - mark = 死对象 → freelist] D4 --> D5[SweepLargeObjects
munmap] D5 --> D6[SwapBitmaps
免去清零 live] D6 --> E[FinishPhase
清 mark stack/ClearMarkedObjects] ``` --- ## 5. CC (Concurrent Copying) 与 CMC 的差别 你当前的 coredump 是 SDK 36,理论上是 CC (生成式) 或 CMC。它们的"Mark"还在,但"Sweep"消失了: **CC** (`concurrent_copying.cc::RunPhases()`): ```cpp InitializePhase(); if (use_generational_cc_ && !young_gen_ && !force_evacuate_all_) MarkingPhase(); // 仅 generational full GC 用,统计存活字节 ActivateReadBarrierEntrypoints(); GrayAllDirtyImmuneObjects(); FlipThreadRoots(); // STW: SetFromSpace + SwapStacks CopyingPhase(); // Scan() 把活对象拷到 to-space ReclaimPhase(); // 直接释放 from-space 整片 region FinishPhase(); ``` - **没有传统 sweep**: from-space 的 region 被 `RegionSpace::ClearFromSpace` 一次性回收,死对象的内存无需逐个还给 freelist - **Read Barrier** 替代 write barrier 解决并发拷贝时引用的"forwarding pointer"问题 **CMC** (Mark Compact, Android 14+): - Mark 阶段保留 (类似 CMS) - Sweep 被 **Compact** 取代:整理活对象到一端,空闲就在另一端,顺带消灭碎片 --- ## 6. 关键结论(直接回答你的问题) | 问题 | 回答 | |---|---| | **Mark 在哪个阶段?** | `MarkingPhase` (并发) + `PausePhase` (STW 补漏)。CMS 三阶段中前两个都属于 mark 范畴 | | **Mark 干了啥?** | 标根 → 三色追踪 → 在 mark bitmap 中置位所有"从根可达"的对象。借助 card table + write barrier 处理并发期间的引用变更 | | **Mark 目的?** | 确定"谁还活着"。只标活的,不标的就是 candidate garbage | | **Sweep 在哪个阶段?** | `ReclaimPhase` (并发,即使名字叫 concurrent mark sweep,sweep 也是并发的) | | **Sweep 干了啥?** | 先处理 Reference / system weaks / class unloading,再遍历 live bitmap 与 mark bitmap 的差集,把死对象内存还给 freelist 或 munmap;最后 swap bitmap 省去清零开销 | | **Sweep 目的?** | 把可达性分析判定为死的对象的内存释放回分配器,供后续 alloc 复用 | --- ## 知识来源(本轮实际调用) - 4 引擎并行 Web 搜索: - Serper Google: `Android ART GC mark sweep phase implementation MarkSweep concurrent` - DuckDuckGo: `ART runtime garbage collector mark phase sweep phase root scan card table` - Tavily (advanced): `Android ART concurrent mark sweep GC algorithm phases mark stack sweep dead objects` -
